message:
Add gconv ABI unit tests and update support matrix to reflect implemented status

Add comprehensive tests for __gconv_create_spec, __gconv_destroy_spec,
__gconv_get_alias_db, __gconv_get_cache, __gconv_get_modules_db,
__gconv, __gconv_transliterate, __gconv_open, __gconv_close, and
constant validation. Update support_matrix.json to mark these gconv
symbols as Implemented (previously GlibcCallThrough), fix dlvsym module
attribution to dlfcn_abi, and update summary counts (3532 implemented,
42 glibc_call_through).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
